zh.lifeSummary: 當James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond於1380年7月20日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達時，他的父親Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond36歲，母親Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond30歲。他與Mary de Burke of Clanicarde結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德莫可勒普享年82歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 科克尤加爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond于1380年7月20日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達时，他的父亲Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond36岁，母亲Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond30岁。他与Mary de Burke of Clanicarde结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1462年在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德莫可勒普享年82岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 科克尤加爾。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

nameMeanings.name: Garrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the given names Gerald and Gerard . In Ireland it is often a direct Anglicization of Gearóid, the Gaelic form of Gerald , and is the name of the former Taoiseach Garret Fitzgerald ( 1926–2011 ).

en.lifeSummary: When James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond was born on 20 July 1380, in County Kildare, Ireland, his father, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, was 36 and his mother, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, was 30. He married Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1462, in Mocollop, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 82, and was buried in Youghal, County Cork, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond est né le 20 juillet 1380, à County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1462, à Mocollop, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Youghal, County Cork, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond am 20. Juli 1380 in County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond 36 und seine Mutter Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond 30. Er hat Mary de Burke of Clanicarde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1462 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Mocollop, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in Youghal, County Cork, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond è nato il il 20 luglio 1380 nel County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1462, nel Mocollop, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmondが1380年7月20日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで生まれた時，父Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmondは36歳，母Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmondは30歳であった。Mary de Burke of Clanicardeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードモコロップで82歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ コルクイオウアルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond(이)가 1380년 7월 20일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Mary de Burke of Clanicarde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 모콜로프에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 코르크 요우그할에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond nasceu em 20 de julho de 1380, em County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1462, em Mocollop, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond родился 20 июля 1380 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1462 г. в местности моколлоп, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности еугэл, коунти корк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Garrett FitzGerald 6th Earl of Desmond nació el 20 de julio de 1380, en County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Gerald FitzMaurice FitzGerald 3rd Earl of Desmond, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Eleanor Boteler Countess of Desmond, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Mary de Burke of Clanicarde. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1462, en Mocollop, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Youghal, County Cork, Irlanda.
